Pochette Métis #M44875# Non-inspected Version
▪️Size: 25*19*7cm▪️
Classic work—Postman bag details, timeless classic, also known as the 'entry-level postman bag'
Versatility beyond imagination, classic monogram fabric, giving an eternal vibe. From its birth to the present, from a bestseller to a classic, it has always been deeply loved. Simple and classic styling! Original factory color-changing material, plus our exclusive French original material, full steel hardware. This is a bulk production piece with ZP visual appeal.

items.name_en: Pre-order 🀄️ OHANEL Calfskin Tote Bag. Suitable for daily commuting, casual shopping, and airport travel. Can be carried by hand or over the shoulder. Large capacity and very practical, fits a laptop 💻. New rhombus basket bag style 🧺✨. Vintage gold hardware with logo. The basket shape brings out a retro vibe. Extra-large space to meet all your capacity needs. Comes with a top handle and long chain strap ⛓. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand. Soft and delicate calfskin, excellent texture and great feel!
